---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case. Why is this feature needed?

## Proposed solution

How would you like it to work? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you didn't go with them.

## Additional context

Any references, screenshots, or examples from other projects.
